_case: pnpm-lock.yaml + docker-compose.yml, --with-docker SET — the `docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d` command is echoed (via run()'s `+ ` prefix) but not actually invoked (dry-run). Confirms the argv is emitted in the exact bash order.

expected.stdout:
PM: pnpm
+ pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts
COMPOSE: docker-compose.yml
+ docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d
